Document:
# Rank Structure
## Rank Authority Authority is determined by rank. The highest ranking individual present is the acting authority and holds final decision making power, unless command is explicitly delegated by an individual of higher rank. Department heads have sole authority over their departments and may only be overridden by the Acting Commander or Executive Officer. If two individuals of equal rank are present, authority defaults to the individual with greater seniority (time served).
## Department Authority Heads of Department (LO, CMP, CMO, IO, EO, and APOLLO) hold the final authority over those operating in their department regardless of rank. If cross department operations would be required (LO and EO working on logisitcs together) it then falls to highest rank.
Departments members may not have their orders overruled by anyone unless approved by the XO or ACO.
XO and CO hold final authority on all department decisions including dismissal of a Department Head if found to be in violation of SOP or UCMJ.
## Specialised Authority Certain jobs and roles have specialised authority depending on their location and use; these are outlined below. - Logistic Technicians and the LO hold authority over requisitions and, for any reason they deem fit, may deny service or use of the budget. - Ordnance Technicians and the LO hold authority over their workshop; if anyone poses a hazard, they may have it removed from them for any reason they deem fit. - DCCs hold the same authority as a DP regarding aircraft interiors and may dismiss anyone from the interior if they find them disruptive to operations, so long as it does not violate dropship SOP. - Weapon Specialists hold the sole authority over their preferred speciality. They cannot be ordered by Command or their SL to pick a certain speciality.
## Change of Command If at any point during an operation, commandership of the unit needs to be handed over, the following SOP’s should be followed. - If an Adjutant is available, they should be next in line to become the Commander - If no Adjutant is available, a member of the command staff should be placed as Commander - If no command staff remains, the highest-ranking officer is to assume command.
## Field & Tactical Authority Tactical Authority refers to the right to direct placement and employment of members of a combat arms unit, and the unit itself. - The Squad Leader and relative Staff Officers have tactical authority over their respective squad which cannot be overwritten by any personnel not directly involved with the tactical operations of the combat arms, this includes Junior Officers or Senior Enlisted who have deployed and attached to squads. - The SL can relinquish authority to another individual of higher rank on their own will, only with approval from the ACO or XO, and only to complete objectives relevant to the new authority (IOs gathering Intel, SEA conducting training, MPs conducting a field arrest.) - The Acting Commanding Officer, following the line of succession, has full authority over their unit regardless of the presence of an individual of higher rank on their vessel or installation, unless that individual commands a unit of greater scale such as a Battalion, Brigade, etc., or unless that individual has signed permission from the Commanding Officer's own superior. (I.E. A Major Pilot cannot overwrite a Captain CO, nor can a LtCol. Company Commander overwrite the CO of another Marine Company without express permission.)
# Current Rank Structure
Below is the currently enforced rank structure for use, subject to change at the demand of High Command
## The Commander The following report to the above role - APOLLO - Adjutant
## The Adjutant The following report to the above role - All Department Heads (LO, CMO, CMP) - All Junior Officers (IO, EO & Staff)
## APOLLO The following report to the above role - Support Synthetics - Working Joes
## The CMP The following report to the above role - Military Police.
## The CMO The following report to the above role - Doctors - Medical Technicians
## The Dropship Pilots The following report to the above role - Dropship Crew Chiefs
## The LO The following report to the above role - Auxiliary technicians
## The Engineering Officer The following report to the above role - Workshop Technicians - Maintenance Technicians
## The Intelligence Officer The following report to the above role - Intelligence Technician
## The Vehicle Commander The following report to the above role - Vehicle Crew
## The Junior Officers The following report to the above role - Squad Leaders - Advisors - Mechanised Crew - Flight Crew
## The Squad Leaders The following report to the above role - Fire Team Leader - Radio Traffic Operator - Corpsman - Combat Technician - Automatic Rifleman - Rifleman - Weapons Specialist
